one_line: Later Imperial Chola emperor famed as the ‘Sungam Tavirtta Cholan’ who abolished many inland tolls.

appearance.age_look: Early 40s, tall and broad-shouldered with a solid, athletic build that suggests both courtly bearing and battlefield experience.
appearance.face: Oval face with strong jaw, medium–deep brown Dravidian complexion, straight prominent nose, thick brows, calm intense eyes slightly upturned in anime style, a short neatly trimmed moustache, small tilaka of white ash with a central red line, default expression composed and regal with a faint, confident half-smile.
appearance.hair: Thick black hair oiled and drawn into a high, long kudumi (topknot) at the back of the crown, the length coiled once and hanging to the nape; front hairline clean with a slight widow’s peak; wears a simple narrow gold circlet-band resting above the forehead, plain except for a tiny central sun motif.
appearance.costume: Upper body mostly bare except for a finely pleated, diagonally draped angavastram of off-white handwoven cotton with a thin maroon and gold border running from left shoulder across the chest to under the right arm; lower garment is a rich deep-red silk veshti/dhoti wrapped in the Tamil style, reaching mid-calf with broad gold zari border at the hem and a sharp front pleat; around his waist a broad ornate gold kamarband with small pendant plaques featuring lotus motifs; on his forearms simple cylindrical gold armlets and slim bangles; ankles bare but toes ringed with two simple silver rings; feet in plain brown leather sandals suitable for court and campaign; jewellery otherwise restrained—a single medium-length gold necklace with flat coin-like pendants, and small round gold ear studs; no shirt, cloak, or fantasy armour—just historically plausible royal textiles and ornaments.
appearance.signature: A long, slightly curved steel sword modeled on early South Indian blades, with a simple bronze hilt and disc pommel, carried in a plain dark-brown leather scabbard slung from a diagonal belt over his right shoulder so the scabbard rests at his left hip, the sword’s hilt always visible near his left hand.

ref_desc: Kulottunga Chola I is a tall, medium-brown skinned emperor with an oval face, neat moustache, high black kudumi with a plain gold circlet, bare upper body with off-white angavastram, deep-red silk dhoti, gold waistbelt and armlets, brown sandals, and a curved steel sword in a dark-brown leather scabbard at his left hip accented by gold and deep-red tones.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style model sheet of Kulottunga Chola I: a tall, broad-shouldered South Indian emperor in his early 40s with medium-brown skin, oval face, strong jaw, straight nose, thick brows, calm intense eyes, and a short neat moustache, bearing a small vertical tilaka of white ash with a central red line on his forehead. His thick black hair is oiled and pulled into a high kudumi (topknot) at the back of the crown, the length coiled and hanging to the nape, and he wears a simple narrow gold circlet-band above the forehead with a tiny central sun motif. His upper body is bare except for a finely pleated off-white cotton angavastram with a thin maroon and gold border draped diagonally from the left shoulder across the chest; his lower garment is a rich deep-red silk veshti/dhoti wrapped Tamil-style to mid-calf with a broad gold zari border and a crisp front pleat. Around his waist is a broad ornate gold kamarband with small lotus-motif plaques; his forearms have simple cylindrical gold armlets and slim bangles, his ankles are bare, and he wears brown leather sandals, with two simple silver toe rings visible. He has a single medium-length gold necklace of flat coin-like pendants and small round gold ear studs, with no armor or cloak. His signature weapon is a long, slightly curved steel sword with a plain bronze hilt and disc pommel, carried in a dark-brown leather scabbard hanging from a diagonal shoulder belt so the scabbard rests at his left hip, the hilt clearly visible near his left hand. Emphasize consistent colors—deep red, off-white, gold accents, dark-brown leather, and his medium-brown skin tone—and show front, side, and back views to clearly display his face, high kudumi with circlet, royal textiles, jewellery, sandals, and sword placement.
